title: Mission & Vision
subtitle: Preserving Oromo cultural identity through authentic traditional craftsmanship and modern cultural fashion.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To preserve and promote Oromo traditional weaving techniques while empowering local artisans and creating sustainable opportunities. We strive to share the beauty, identity, and cultural heritage of Oromo people through authentic handcrafted cultural clothing.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a globally recognized Oromo cultural fashion brand that proudly represents Oromo identity, tradition, craftsmanship, and cultural excellence while inspiring future generations to value and preserve their heritage.
